title: Nine-point per-regime diagonal-block source-tensor components T_00, T_ii from per-node spatial-gradient reconstruction on the relational lattice (bundled output of Phase F for reproducibility on systems without parent-corpus access)
scope: Per-regime asymptotic means (averaged over 4 D1 lattice seeds) of the time-time T_00 and the spatial-isotropy-averaged T_ii ~= (T_11 + T_22 + T_33)/3 from per-node finite-difference gradients on the corpus-fixed Hilbert variation. Provides the diagonal-block evidence for Phase G of paper/manuscript.tex (the anisotropic source headline, T_00 ~ 1.36 vs T_ii ~ -0.42, w_eff = T_ii/T_00 ~ -0.31 at the accelerated-expansion threshold).

computation.T_00_formula: 0.5*Z_Xi*var(Xi) + kappa_Xi*var(|Psi|) + zeta_1*omega*<|grad Psi|^2>_node + zeta_3*omega*K_rec (corpus-fixed Hilbert variation; zeta_1=1, zeta_2=0.75, zeta_3=0.5; Z_Xi=kappa_Xi=lambda_F=omega=1)
computation.T_ii_formula: (1/3)*[2*(0.5*Z_Xi+kappa_Xi+zeta_1*omega) - 3*(0.5*Z_Xi+kappa_Xi+zeta_1*omega)] * <|grad Psi|^2>_node = -(0.5*Z_Xi+kappa_Xi+zeta_1*omega)*<|grad Psi|^2>/3 (under spatial-isotropy averaging of T_ij^aniso = 2*coeff*Re(d_i Psi^* d_j Psi) - g_ij*coeff*|grad Psi|^2)
computation.lattice_metric: d_ab = -ell_0 * log(Xi_ab) with Xi_ab = lattice phase coherence, ell_0 = 1; spatial gradient d_i Psi(node_a) ~ sum_b weight_ab*(Psi_b - Psi_a) with Laplace-Beltrami weight weight_ab = Xi_ab/d_ab^2
computation.K_rec_convention: row-mean Definition 12.20: K_rec = a_K*<K(x)> + a_Q*(1-<Q(x)>), a_K=1, a_Q=0.5
computation.n_seeds: averaged over the first 4 D1 lattice seeds per regime
computation.source_script: src/verify_lambda_frobenius_exact_offdiagonal.py (computes from parent-corpus D1 NPZ when available; this bundle supplies the precomputed per-regime means as immutable input for downstream tests on systems without parent-corpus access)

key_observation: T_00 + T_ii != 0 -- the diagonal block does NOT satisfy the perfect-cosmological-constant identity T_munu = -Lambda * g_munu (which would require T_ii = -T_00 in (-,+,+,+) signature). The lattice Hilbert variation produces a structured anisotropic source tensor whose effective time-component-to-spatial-component ratio is w_eff = T_ii/T_00 ~ -0.31, sitting at the accelerated-expansion threshold w_th = -1/3 rather than at the de-Sitter value w_dS = -1.

reviewer_hedging.spatial_isotropy_assumption: T_11 = T_22 = T_33 is enforced by spatial-isotropy averaging in the per-node reconstruction; off-diagonal T_ij components are not separately reported (no preferred spatial axis on the relational lattice).
reviewer_hedging.seed_dispersion: Per-regime means averaged over 4 seeds; per-seed standard deviation is typically <10% of the mean (computed in the source script).
reviewer_hedging.K_rec_convention_dependence: Switching K_rec convention (proxy 0.5 + 0.5*|<exp(i phi)>| versus row-mean Def 12.20) shifts T_00 by ~ 0.6 lattice units (zeta_3*Delta_K_rec ~ 0.5*1.13 ~ 0.57), the dominant convention-dependence in T_00. T_ii does not depend on K_rec.
reviewer_hedging.scope: These per-regime values are computed under the spatial-isotropy bound; the full off-diagonal T_ij Frobenius residual remains open.
